In contrast, biomaterials made from these natural components, such as collagen or fibrin gels, can be clear and allow light to pass through, but they are often fragile and easily damaged during handling or experiments. abstract: Artificial intelligence (AI) systems increasingly assist with decisions in areas such as, medicine, science, and education, but they still make simple reasoning mistakes. abstract: In natural history museums, collections of preserved specimens give scientists the ability to study species from around the world and across time.
